positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a fox and a lantern floating through a vibrant, bioluminescent forest at twilight. The fox has an elegant, alert silhouette and is sitting gently on a glowing, stylized mushroom cap. The background features intricate, repeating patterns of glowing flora and geometric leaf structures, rendered in deep blues, magentas, emerald greens, and warm golds. The style should be highly detailed digital art with a strong Art Nouveau influence, emphasizing clean lines, bold color blocking, and a sense of magical depth. Composition must be perfectly balanced and centered, designed to look seamless when printed on fabric. Minimal visible texture, high contrast between the deep shadows and the bright, ethereal lights. Vector art quality, 2k resolution.
negative: blurry, noise, low quality, text, watermark, signature, logo, writing, artifacts, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, disfigured, grainy, poor composition, grainy, monochrome, grayscale
